query: CHP olağanüstü kurultay çağrı heyeti Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi başvuru karar - latest status as of late June / early July 2026. Has Özgür Özel's team filed the application under Civil Code Art 75 requesting appointment of a 3-person çağrı heyeti to convene a CHP extraordinary congress? Has any court issued a decision?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary of findings:

## Answer

**No application has been filed, and no court decision exists** — as of the latest reporting (June 29 – July 2, 2026).

**Key findings:**

1. **Application NOT filed yet.** Despite many Turkish outlets reporting around June 29 that Özel's team would go to the Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi "today" to request a çağrı heyeti, the filing did not happen. Özel's legal advisor/deputy chair **Gül Çiftçi told Odatv directly: "We currently have no application filed,"** explaining they were deliberately waiting because "technical matters" for the congress had not yet been resolved.

2. **No court decision** exists, since there is no pending application.

3. **Background:** A May 21, 2026 Ankara Regional Court of Appeals "mutlak butlan" (absolute nullity) ruling removed Özel and reinstated Kılıçdaroğlu as court-installed chairman. Özel-aligned delegates then collected **833 signatures** (headquarters counted **820** valid) demanding an extraordinary congress. A 10-day deadline (expiring ~June 26) passed without a formal response.

4. **Revised timing:** Türkiye Gazetesi (June 30) reported the team is now targeting **~July 11, 2026** to file, based on charter math (congress must be held by ~July 26, announced 15 days prior).

5. **Parallel track:** Özel's camp is simultaneously discussing forming a **new party** (possible announcement ~July 24), and Kılıçdaroğlu's side announced an ordinary congress for early September.

**Caveat:** Latest data is July 2, 2026. This is a fast-moving situation with July 11/26 target dates, so a filing after July 2 would not yet be reflected.

sources.title: CHP'de gündem kurultay için 'çağrı heyeti': Başvuru bugün denilmişti ama... Gül Çiftçi Odatv'ye anlattı
sources.snippet: Gül Çiftçi: 'Kurultay için teknik bazı hususlar oluşuyor. O aşamaya gelinmediği için henüz bir başvuru yapmayacağız.'

sources.title: CHP'de karar haftası
sources.snippet: 833 imza teslim edildi, Genel Merkez 820 olarak açıkladı; 10 günlük süre cuma günü doldu; başvuru bu hafta ama gün netleşmedi.

sources.title: CHP adliye koridorlarına hapsoldu! Kurultay da ihraçlar da mahkemelik olacak
sources.snippet: Başvuru henüz yapılmadı; Özel ekibi 11 Temmuz 2026'yı bekliyor; kurultay son gün ~26 Temmuz, 15 gün önce ilan gerekli.

sources.title: CHP'de kurultay krizi mahkemeye taşınıyor
sources.snippet: Özel'e destek veren ekip bugün sulh hukuk mahkemesinden partiye çağrı heyeti atanmasını talep edecek; kabul halinde en geç 45 gün içinde kurultay.

sources.title: Özel cephesinden yeni adım! Kurultay talebi için Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi hazırlığı
sources.snippet: Noter onaylı 833 delegenin talebi işleme alınmazsa 29 Haziran'da sulh hukuk mahkemesine başvuru yapılacağı bildirildi.

sources.title: Kritik tarih 26 Haziran... Kılıçdaroğlu yönetimine tanınan süre doluyor
sources.snippet: Noter onaylı 833 delege imzasının işleme konulması için verilen süre 26 Haziran'da dolacak; adımlar atılmazsa kurultay talebi yargıya taşınacak.

sources.title: CHP Genel Merkezi 'olağan takvim' demişti! Özel kanadı 'çağrı heyeti' isteyecek
sources.snippet: Genel Merkez geçerli imzayı 820 olarak duyururken Özel cephesi mahkeme kanalıyla çağrı heyeti istemek için harekete geçiyor.

sources.title: Özgür Özel yeni parti kuracak mı? Yeni parti için kritik tarih belli oldu
sources.snippet: 02.07.2026 – Özel ve kurmayları Meclis'teki toplantıda yeni parti senaryolarını ele aldı.

sources.title: Kurultay krizi yargıya taşındı, kulislerde yeni parti sesleri
sources.snippet: Olağanüstü kurultay talebi mahkeme gündeminde; 833 imza Genel Merkez'e sunuldu.

key_facts: As of June 29 – July 2, 2026, Özgür Özel's team had NOT filed the çağrı heyeti application to the Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi; no court decision exists.
Özel's legal advisor/deputy chair Gül Çiftçi told Odatv: 'We currently have no application filed' and said they would wait because technical matters for the congress were unresolved.
Multiple outlets (Olay Gazete, Haberler, Haber Ekspres, Aydınlık) reported around June 29 that a filing was imminent/'today,' but it did not happen.

The trigger: a May 21, 2026 Ankara Regional Court of Appeals (36th Civil Chamber) 'mutlak butlan' (absolute nullity) ruling removed Özel and reinstated Kemal Kılıçdaroğlu as court-installed CHP chairman.
833 notarized delegate signatures were submitted for an extraordinary congress; the Kılıçdaroğlu administration counted 820 as valid after disciplinary referrals and withdrawals.
A 10-day deadline for headquarters to act expired without a formal response (key date cited as June 26, 2026).
The planned court route: ask the Sulh Hukuk Mahkemesi to appoint a 'çağrı heyeti' (call committee; some outlets said kayyum/trustee) to convene the congress; if granted, congress within ~45 days.
Türkiye Gazetesi (June 30) reported the revised target filing date as ~July 11, 2026, based on charter timing (congress by ~July 26, announced 15 days prior).
Kılıçdaroğlu administration announced an ordinary congress to begin in early September as a counter-move.
Özel and allies held a ~2.5-hour TBMM meeting July 1–2, 2026 discussing a possible new party (announcement floated around July 24, 2026).

data_points.metric: Delegate signatures submitted for extraordinary congress
Valid signatures counted by Kılıçdaroğlu-led headquarters
Deadline given to headquarters to act on request
Maximum period to hold extraordinary congress if court grants call committee
Revised target date for court application filing
Calculated last permissible congress date (last Sunday within 45 days)
